name: understand-anything
description: AI-powered codebase understanding - analyze, visualize, and explain any project

interface.shortDescription: Analyze, visualize, and explain any codebase.
interface.longDescription: Understand Anything combines LLM analysis with static code scanning to build interactive architecture maps, onboarding guides, and codebase explanations.
defaultPrompt: Map this codebase with Understand Anything.
Explain the architecture of this project.
Build an onboarding guide for this repo.
